how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes. Surgical always.
session_040_completed: FILE DROP TYPE FIX — .txt files were landing as Project tabs. Root cause: _on_canvas_file_drop called push_project_from_ethica for DOC_EXTS branch. Fix: routed DOC_EXTS and fallback to new _drop_as_document() method instead. Now always creates a fresh Document tab named after the file.
_DROP_AS_DOCUMENT BUILT — New method in canvas_window.py. Creates Document tab, loads content, fires chat notification via notify_fn (not on_content_change). Prevents River auto-read.
DUPLICATE NOTIFICATION REMOVED — Original _on_canvas_file_drop had its own on_content_change call. Removed — _drop_as_document owns the notification now.

NOTIFY_FN PATH WIRED — canvas_window.py __init__ now accepts notify_fn parameter. main_window.py passes _canvas_notify which calls chat_window.add_message(sender=system). File drop chat bubble bypasses _canvas_context entirely — no River auto-read triggered.
DROP ZONE REREGISTER — scroll_drop.py reregister_drop() method added. Called after Ops lazy-init AND after every drop. Partially improves drop zone stability across multiple drops.

OPS FILE TREE CLICKABLE — ops_popup.py _insert_tree_result() built. fm_tree output renders with 📄 filenames as clickable purple underlined tags. Click searches file under tree root, reads it, calls canvas._drop_as_document(). File turns green on open. set_canvas() method added to OpsPopup. Wired in main_window _route_to_ops lazy init.

TAB DELETE INDEX GUARD — _save_active_tab_content() now returns immediately if _active_tab_index < 0. Prevents Python -1 index writing deleted content into last tab. _delete_tab sets index to -1 before _switch_tab call.
session_040_still_open: TAB DELETE CLEARING ADJACENT — Tab delete still corrupts adjacent tab content. Index guard added but root cause not fully resolved. The _clear_active_tab body appears orphaned inside _delete_tab (lines after _switch_tab call). Needs careful re-read of _delete_tab full structure before next patch attempt.
DROP ZONE STABILITY — reregister_drop after every drop helps but zone still dies after several drops in some cases. May need deeper tkinterdnd2 investigation or fallback to file browser click.

~/Ethica/ui/main_window.py — notify_fn/_canvas_notify wired to CanvasWindow, set_canvas wired in _route_to_ops lazy init, reregister_drop after Ops init
~/Ethica/ui/scroll_drop.py — reregister_drop() method added, called after every drop
~/Ethica/ui/ops_popup.py — set_canvas() added, _canvas_ref slot, _insert_tree_result() built, filepath tag configured, fm_tree branch in push()

critical_debug_context.drop_zone_suspect: tkinterdnd2 registration breaks when Toplevel created. reregister_drop() re-registers both _canvas and _label widgets. If still failing, check if Ops Toplevel is somehow re-stealing focus on subsequent drops.
critical_debug_context.notify_fn_flow: _drop_as_document -> self.notify_fn(msg) -> main_window._canvas_notify -> chat_window.add_message(sender=system). Does NOT touch _canvas_context. Does NOT trigger River.

surgical_reminders: chmod u+w <file> before patching sealed files
guard seal confirm after every verified change
ast.parse() after every single write — no exceptions
grep first, sed to read, python3 to patch
Never rewrite working files from scratch
Three-place trigger registration: MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers + guard scope
